reviews.review_description:
Cake Or Fake? is a fun and original VR game where you cook a cake, decorate it, then get inspected — and the chef has to decide which cake is real and which one is fake. The concept is simple, creative, and instantly enjoyable.

The execution is solid, and making a cake in VR is surprisingly satisfying: cooking is basically instant (no waiting, no mess, no cleaning 😅). Decorating is also a highlight and adds a lot of personality to each creation.

Easy to understand, quick to jump into, and full of instant fun — a great little game to play solo or show to friends 🎮✨

reviews.review_title: Make some cake and decorate it
reviews.review_description:
Making a cake isn’t that difficult. 

Is is more difficult when the rolls are changed. That you have to choose the real cake. Much harder.

Rounds are small, but very easy to understand what to do.  Making cake, coloring cake, pairing donuts…

Looking forward to discover new rounds.

I honestly didn’t expect cake or fake? VR to be this much fun but wow, it completely hooked me from the first round!

The whole concept is simple but genius: spotting what’s real and what’s secretly cake is way harder in VR than you think. 

Maybe the colouring can be matched up a bit better with the “real” item.

The tension of second-guessing yourself, combined with the satisfying moment when you slice something open, makes every round feel exciting and hilarious, I’d like to see the “slice” actually go right through the cake. 

The visuals are colourful and clean, performance is smooth on Quest, and the controls feel really natural, perfect for quick sessions or showing off to friends and family. It’s also an amazing party game; everyone loves shouting their guesses while watching you play.

Whether you’re a casual VR player or a seasoned Quest veteran, this is one of those games that’s easy to jump into but hard to put down.

Needs a bit of work but for its price it’s great. 

Highly recommended – a must-have for your VR library! 🎂🥽

reviews.review_title: A FUN AND WHIMSICAL SOLO VR EXPERIENCE
reviews.review_description:
Cake or Fake offers a relaxed and playful VR experience with intuitive interactions and delightful visual surprises.
Perfect for casual solo sessions, it engages your curiosity and sense of discovery in a cheerful and lighthearted way.

reviews.review_title: my niece loves being in the kitchen!!
reviews.review_description: The game is very entertaining, the atmosphere is very well done, my niece loves being in the kitchen!! We would like a way to select the level, and an online timer would also be a good challenge.

Cake or fake is a fun game with a little bit of skill and a lot of good guessing. I look forward to see what is coming
This kind of game is fun and is played asa solo player.

This is a great game with cooking fun without all the mess . Easy to follow instructions its simple to create what the  chef ask you to do and complete tasks.  
Graphics are good also .
Small game in size so will not take up much room on your internal drive .
Worth a look

For people that like baking in the kitchen or for your kids that want to bake without the mess this is for you.  Just play around making cakes and try and make them look like the real instead of the fake.  Looking forward to more levels.
This game is so much fun it had me hooked straight away. Can’t wait for new levels to be added I highly recommend this.
This game is a bit short, but it's so much fun. I'm really looking forward to more content being added soon.
It's fun trying to figure out which cakes are fake and it's interesting to make them
